summary: Backend + frontend testing for admin sponsor management. 14/14 pytest backend tests pass. Admin login (correct/wrong pw), JWT protection on all admin endpoints, full sponsor CRUD, sponsor injection into /api/places/search (pinned first with sponsored=true; hidden when active=false; category & cuisine filters honored), regression on spin/create restaurant/curated fallback. Frontend /admin flow (login card -> add sponsor -> toggle -> delete -> logout, localStorage token) works. Home footer shows '$29/month — first month FREE' with mailto links to stevelammerts@gmail.com. Add-spot dialog no longer has add-sponsored-switch. Spin flow with ZIP 10001 returns real Google result (Kyma Hudson Yards).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~760 lines - candidate for splitting (routes/admin.py, services/places.py) but not blocking.
Admin login rate-limited to 10/min per IP; no brute-force lockout after N fails - acceptable for single-admin app but worth noting.
fetch_active_sponsors returns docs already excluding _id via projection - good.
seed_data_creation: All TEST_ prefixed sponsors created during tests are cleaned up by module teardown; the TEST_UI_Sponsor from Playwright was deleted via UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin auth uses Bearer JWT (HS256, 12h) from ADMIN_PASSWORD env. Sponsors are pinned first in /api/places/search when matching category/cuisines/prices. Real Google Places is live for ZIP 10001. All admin data-testids per spec are present in /app/frontend/src/pages/Admin.jsx.
